insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook on checkout UI extensions and the block_progress capability it depends on are deprecated starting in version 2026-07. Existing extensions will continue to work on versions prior to 2026-07. The deprecation affects how extensions interact with the checkout journey.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their checkout UI extensions for usage of the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook and plan for migration to alternative methods for intercepting the buyer's journey. This might involve updating extensions to use newer APIs or capabilities that achieve similar functionality without relying on deprecated hooks. It is crucial to test these changes thoroughly to ensure a seamless checkout experience for merchants and their customers.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may notice changes in how some checkout extensions function, particularly if those extensions relied on the deprecated hook for custom functionality. However, well-maintained extensions should continue to provide a good user experience.
insight.why_it_matters: This deprecation is part of Shopify's effort to maintain a healthy and secure ecosystem, ensuring that extensions are built with the latest best practices and security standards. It encourages developers to keep their extensions up-to-date and compatible with the latest Shopify APIs.
insight.code_example: query { shop { checkoutUiExtensions(first: 10) { edges { node { id } } } } }

updates.summary: The CLI has been updated to version 4.5.1, which includes a bump to cli-hydrogen 13.0.1.
The CLI now includes new store commands, including listing and store creation, in version 4.5.0.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: Hydrogen's cli-hydrogen has been updated to 13.0.1, which includes fixes for reading disabled command metadata and preserving actionable build errors.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: Create Hydrogen has been updated to 5.0.38, which includes an explicit ~ app alias for new Hydrogen projects.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: The Hydrogen skeleton has been updated to 2026.4.5, which includes an explicit ~ app alias for new Hydrogen projects.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has been introduced, aiming to increase trust in the partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now requires per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow has been updated to reduce breaking changes in Action extensions, giving server-side code more control over field mismatches.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now resolves an action's runtime URL on every execution, automatically updating the URL when the app is redeployed.
The CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0, which includes updates to Javy related dependencies and fixes for long URL wrapping.

recap.headline: Hydrogen and CLI updates with new store commands and patch changes

themes.title: Hydrogen Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen received updates with new patch changes, including @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1, @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38, and skeleton@2026.4.5. These updates include improvements to command metadata, build errors, and JavaScript project configurations.

themes.title: Shopify Ecosystem Updates
themes.detail: The Shopify ecosystem saw updates to POS Extensions, Identity verification for Shopify Partners, and App Pricing. POS Extensions now support background extension targets, Identity verification is now required for Shopify Partners, and App Pricing has been updated with more plans and no-charge plan testing.

actions.text: Review and implement new POS Extensions background extension target
Verify Identity as a Shopify Partner
